purpose: Conformance contract for the AllocationArena quarantine-drain invariants originally landed under bd-66wz.1 (closed 2026-02-13). The audit pass 2026-05-10T03-16-16Z scored bd-66wz.1 at 285/1000 (false-closed) with a missing `tests.unit.primary` item — even though two unit tests already exist in the arena module. This manifest + harness gate makes the linkage explicit so the next audit pass can see the unit-test evidence at file:line.

required_invariants.description: drain_quarantine must pop entries from the FRONT of the quarantine deque until both quarantine_bytes ≤ QUARANTINE_MAX_BYTES AND quarantine.len() ≤ current_depth().
Entry-count threshold must come from quarantine_controller::current_depth() so the depth lever is honored.
Eviction order must be FIFO — the drain loop calls quarantine.pop_front(), not pop_back.
After eviction, the corresponding slot's state must transition to SafetyState::Freed so a UAF lookup of an already-evicted pointer is reported as Freed (not Quarantined).
drain_quarantine returns the evicted entries so the caller can release the underlying raw allocations — leaking would silently re-introduce bytes pressure.
